name: Fig Bars g
recipeInstructions:
1. For the filling: Finely chop the figs and mix them in a saucepan with sugar, water, and lemon juice.
2. Place over medium heat and cook, stirring for 10 minutes or until thick and jam-like. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Cover and refrigerate.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat together butter, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract until well blended.
5. Mix flour, salt, and baking soda in another bowl.
6. Stir the dry ingredients into the butter mixture; the dough will be stiff.
7. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 3-4 hours or overnight.
8. When ready to bake, turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface.
9. Roll into a 14x12-inch rectangle.
10. Cut into 4 strips that are 3-1/2 x 12 inches long.
11. Spoon filling evenly down the center of each strip.
12. With a spatula, fold in the sides of the strips.
13. Press edges together to seal.
14. Cut each strip into 10 pieces.
15. Arrange seam-side down on baking sheets.
16. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until firm and lightly browned.
17. Cool on racks.
18. Store airtight.
